attributes.originalText:
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<title></title>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width; initial-scale=1.0; maximum-scale=1.0; user-scalable=0;"/><link href="https://cdn.bootcss.com/highlight.js/9.12.0/styles/dracula.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.bootcss.com/highlight.js/9.12.0/highlight.min.js"></script> <script>hljs.configure({'useBR': true});hljs.initHighlightingOnLoad();</script> <style>body{background: #FFFFFF;}a {color:#3398DB !important;}.highlight pre, pre { word-wrap: normal;  white-space: pre; }thead, tr {background:#F5F5F5;}td, th {padding: 5px 10px;font-size: 12px;direction:hor}.highlight {overflow: scroll; background: #282a36}tr:nth-child(even) {background:#24292e;color:#F5F5F5;}tr:nth-child(odd) {background: #F5F5F5;color:#24292e;}th {font-size: 14px;color:#F5F5F5;background:#24292e;}</style></head>
<body>
卡卡罗</body>
</html>
